Projects and products

Current product investments up front. Historical work in archive context.

RePass Cloud actively invests in product and platform work, while keeping legacy open-source projects accessible for transparency and reference.

Active products

Current product focus

Cinturon360

Multi-tenant operational control software for partner workflows, identity governance, and evidence-heavy enterprise operations.

.NETAzureEntra IDMulti-tenant
Visit product

Aethon

Hiring intelligence platform focused on verified actors, workflow integrity, and recruiter-grade marketplace operations.

.NETBlazorPostgreSQLAI
Visit product
Custom delivery

Not everything we build is a named product.

A large portion of our work is bespoke enterprise software: identity automation, workflow systems, cloud governance tooling, and integration-heavy control layers.

See case studies
Historical archive

Legacy and open-source work

These projects are archived and retained for reference. They are not current product priorities.

LunaVPN
